## Problem

What practical audit workflow or operational problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Runtime Impact

Does this require new Agent images, MCP tools, Docker permissions, model
providers, or external services?

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, links, or constraints.
